Auth.UnauthorizedMessage:
This app requires the User Manager role.
If you need access, contact SLSP Support.
Auth.ErrorMessage:
The service is currently unavailable.
Please try again later.

errors.PRIMARY_ID_DOMAIN_NOT_ALLOWED: The domain "{{domain}}" is not allowed for this institution

listUsers.toggleDisableMessage: Disable the link for {{almaPrimaryId}}? The user will not be able to authenticate via edu-ID while disabled.
listUsers.unlinkConfirmMessage: Permanently remove the link for {{almaPrimaryId}}? This action cannot be undone.
